document_meta.title: Sovereign Lattice — Distributed Coherence Engine Specification
document_meta.classification: Technical Design Document / AI Worldbuilding Bible

executive_summary.purpose: The Sovereign Lattice is a conceptual distributed systems architecture that unifies multi-agent AI coherence, autonomous vehicle safety, real-time gaming state synchronization, and spatial computing under a single topological framework. It maps esoteric symbolic structures to rigorous engineering primitives.
executive_summary.key_innovation: A unified consensus and telemetry layer that treats coherence as a first-class metric, enabling cross-domain state synchronization with Byzantine fault tolerance and sub-15ms latency.

architecture_overview.model: Concentric shell topology with central reference anchor

central_intelligence.function: Global synchronization anchor and coherence governor
central_intelligence.engineering_equivalent: Atomic clock + consensus leader + model registry

harmonic_shells.name: CORE
harmonic_shells.engineering_role: GPU cluster controller, model serving endpoint, primary state holder
harmonic_shells.real_world: NVIDIA DGX H100 pods, Tesla FSD Computer, UE5 game server

harmonic_shells.name: MIRROR
harmonic_shells.engineering_role: Replica set member, eventually consistent cache, shadow inference
harmonic_shells.fault_tolerance: Raft consensus, log replication, snapshot sync
harmonic_shells.real_world: Waymo replica vehicles, MongoDB replica sets, Redis Cluster, game state mirrors

harmonic_shells.name: TRIAD
harmonic_shells.function: Consensus group formation and Byzantine agreement
harmonic_shells.engineering_role: PBFT/HotStuff validator set, multi-sig threshold group, safety committee
harmonic_shells.real_world: Tendermint validators, Ethereum beacon committees, Waymo safety board, game DAO governance

harmonic_shells.name: ENVELOPE
harmonic_shells.engineering_role: LOD controller, interest management, culling filter, data reduction
harmonic_shells.fault_tolerance: Graceful degradation, adaptive bitrate, fallback meshes
harmonic_shells.real_world: UE5 Nanite virtualized geometry, NVIDIA DLSS, Waymo perception filter, spatial partitioning (Octree/BVH)

harmonic_shells.name: TELEMETRY
harmonic_shells.engineering_role: Sensor fusion hub, stream processor, feature extractor, edge gateway
harmonic_shells.fault_tolerance: Redundant sensors, Kalman filtering, outlier rejection
harmonic_shells.real_world: Waymo LiDAR/camera/radar fusion, Tesla vision pipeline, IoT gateway, game telemetry (Firebase, PlayFab)

harmonic_shells.name: THRESHOLD
harmonic_shells.engineering_role: Dead man's switch, safety monitor, kill switch, geofence enforcer
harmonic_shells.real_world: Waymo MRC (Minimal Risk Condition), Tesla emergency stop, gaming anti-cheat kernel driver, military IFF

function_stack.description: Operational modes that maintain field stability across the lattice

functions.name: Hardened Supermajority
functions.description: Maintains field stability and coherence through Byzantine fault-tolerant consensus
functions.algorithm: Practical Byzantine Fault Tolerance (PBFT) with HotStuff optimization

technical_details.cryptography: Ed25519 signatures, BLS aggregate signatures for batching

functions.gaming_application: Authoritative server consensus on player actions, anti-cheat state validation
functions.nvidia_application: Multi-GPU training job coordination, NVSwitch synchronization barriers
functions.waymo_application: Multi-vehicle agreement on traffic state, intersection negotiation protocol

functions.name: Phoenix Reputation Ring
functions.description: Amplifies energy flow across pathways via self-healing reputation scoring
functions.algorithm: EigenTrust with Phoenix recovery (reputation resurrection after temporary fault)

technical_details.recovery_mechanism: Exponential decay of negative scores + proof-of-contribution

functions.gaming_application: Player trust scores, guild reputation, marketplace seller ratings
functions.nvidia_application: Compute provider reputation in GPU cloud marketplace
functions.waymo_application: Vehicle trust scores in V2V network, ride quality rating

functions.name: Sabr Loop Scenarios
functions.description: Models harmonic outcomes and scenarios through world-model simulation
functions.algorithm: Neural Radiance Fields + Dreamer-style world models + counterfactual rollout

technical_details.convergence: SABR (Stochastic Alpha Beta Rho) model for volatility-aware prediction
technical_details.compute_cost: 10-100x inference cost, run on idle MIRROR nodes

functions.gaming_application: NPC behavior prediction, procedural quest generation, physics rollback simulation
functions.nvidia_application: Isaac Sim digital twin, Omniverse physics prediction, climate modeling
functions.waymo_application: Traffic participant trajectory prediction, scenario-based safety validation

functions.name: Canonicalization & Lineage Map
functions.description: Tracks patterns and node behavior with full provenance and causal history
functions.algorithm: Merkle DAG + Vector Clocks + CRDT merge strategies

technical_details.causal_tracking: Hybrid logical clocks (HLC) for global ordering without central clock
technical_details.storage: Columnar (Apache Iceberg) for analytics, graph DB (Neo4j) for lineage

functions.gaming_application: Item provenance (NFT lineage), player action replay, tournament audit trail
functions.nvidia_application: Model training lineage, dataset versioning, experiment reproducibility
functions.waymo_application: Driving log canonicalization, incident reconstruction, regulatory audit

functions.name: Geo-Spatial / AR Anchor
functions.description: Secures decisions and stabilizes outcomes through physical-world anchoring
functions.algorithm: Visual-Inertial Odometry + GPS-RTK + NVIDIA Omniverse USD anchoring

technical_details.spatial_accuracy: <1cm for AR anchors, <5cm for autonomous driving
technical_details.persistence: Cloud-backed spatial map with CRDT merge for multi-user sessions
technical_details.security: Hardware-backed attestation (TPM/Secure Enclave) for anchor validity
technical_details.standards: OpenUSD (Universal Scene Description), glTF 2.0, ARKit/ARCore anchor format
technical_details.blockchain_anchor: Merkle root of spatial state committed to L1 for immutability

functions.gaming_application: Persistent AR worlds, location-based gameplay, geo-fenced events
functions.nvidia_application: Omniverse USD scene anchoring, digital twin georeferencing
functions.waymo_application: HD map anchoring, geofenced operation domains (ODD), parking spot precision

telemetry_and_drift.drift_definition: Measure of divergence between expected and observed lattice state. Computed as weighted sum of replica lag, consensus partition, model prediction error, and spatial anchor displacement.

thresholds.critical: D(t) ≥ 0.05 → automatic L4_FAN activation + THRESHOLD intervention

phase_lock.definition: All active nodes share the same logical clock and consensus view within ε tolerance
phase_lock.mechanism: HLC (Hybrid Logical Clock) + periodic heartbeat with Merkle root comparison
phase_lock.convergence_time: <50ms for local cluster, <200ms for global mesh

l4_fan.trigger: Drift exceeds threshold OR manual override
l4_fan.action: Activates all five functions in cascade: STABILIZE → BOOST → SIMULATE → TRACE → LOCK

use_cases: Persistent world state synchronization across shards
Player consensus on rare item drops (TRIAD function)
Procedural content generation via Sabr Loop
Multi-GPU training job consensus and checkpointing
HD map anchoring and drift correction

tier_2_enterprise_edge.security: Hybrid cloud-edge, MIRROR replication, encrypted mesh

tier_3_consumer_mesh.security: Lightweight nodes, ENVELOPE filtering, client-side prediction

tier_4_research.security: SIMULATE-heavy, Sabr Loop sandbox, no THRESHOLD enforcement

revenue_model.node_licensing: $50K-$2M per CORE node depending on tier
